channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: catchorg/Catch2
item.description: 待翻译：A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)

item.title: abseil/abseil-cpp
item.description: 待翻译：Abseil Common Libraries (C++)

item.title: davila7/claude-code-templates
item.description: 待翻译：CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code
item.category: 开发者工具, 可观测性

item.title: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
item.description: 待翻译：A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.
item.category: 开发框架, AI代理, skills, 开发者工具

item.title: hashicorp/terraform
item.description: 待翻译：Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

item.title: zeux/meshoptimizer
item.description: 待翻译：Mesh optimization library that makes meshes smaller and faster to render

item.title: openai/plugins
item.description: 待翻译：OpenAI Plugins

item.title: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
item.description: 待翻译：This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

item.title: chriskohlhoff/asio
item.description: 待翻译：Asio C++ Library

item.title: oven-sh/bun
item.description: 待翻译：Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

item.title: actions/checkout
item.description: 待翻译：Action for checking out a repo

item.title: home-assistant/core
item.description: 待翻译：🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.

item.title: microsoft/PowerToys
item.description: 待翻译：Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

item.title: cypress-io/cypress
item.description: 待翻译：Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

item.title: vercel/next.js
item.description: 待翻译：The React Framework

item.title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
item.description: 待翻译：A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

item.title: malisper/pgrust
item.description: 待翻译：Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests

item.title: dotnet/aspnetcore
item.description: 待翻译：ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

item.title: prisma/prisma
item.description: 待翻译：Next-generation ORM for Node.js & TypeScript | PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and CockroachDB

item.title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
item.description: 待翻译：A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

item.title: obra/superpowers
item.description: 待翻译：An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
item.category: 开发框架, AI代理, skills

item.title: nasa/fprime
item.description: 待翻译：F´ - A flight software and embedded systems framework

item.title: ansible/ansible
item.description: 待翻译：Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.

item.title: nuxt/nuxt
item.description: 待翻译：the full-stack Vue framework
